Product Demo.title: Welcome & Agenda
Product Demo.body:
Welcome everyone!

**Today's agenda:**
- Product overview
- Key features walkthrough
- Live demo
- Q&A

Product Demo.title: Key Differentiators
Product Demo.body:
**Three things that set us apart:**
- Seamless integration with existing tools
- Real-time collaboration features
- Enterprise-grade security and compliance

Product Demo.title: ROI Talking Points
Product Demo.body:
**Average customer results:**
- 40% reduction in manual processes
- 3x faster onboarding
- 95% user adoption within 30 days

Product Demo.title: Objection Handling
Product Demo.body:
**Price:** Focus on total cost of ownership
**Timeline:** Typical deployment is 2-4 weeks
**Security:** SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant

Product Demo.title: Next Steps
Product Demo.body:
**Wrap-up checklist:**
- Send follow-up email with recording
- Schedule technical deep-dive
- Share pricing proposal
- Intro to customer success team

Technical Deep Dive.title: Architecture Overview
Technical Deep Dive.body:
**Discuss:**
- Microservices architecture
- Cloud-native deployment options
- API-first design philosophy

Technical Deep Dive.title: Integration Points
Technical Deep Dive.body:
**Key integrations:**
- REST API with full CRUD
- Webhook event system
- SSO via SAML/OIDC
- Prebuilt connectors for major platforms

Technical Deep Dive.title: Security & Compliance
Technical Deep Dive.body:
**Certifications:** SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001
**Data:** Encryption at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3)
**Access:** Role-based access control with audit logging
